final_prompt.prompt:
Create a photorealistic product shot of a sapphire ring with diamond pavé, showing fire and brilliance inside the gemstone.

Style/medium: photorealistic jewelry photography, macro product shot with shallow depth of field
Composition: extreme close-up macro, eye-level angle, tight crop on ring face, soft bokeh
Subject: oval-cut sapphire center stone with deep blue saturation, surrounded by brilliant-cut diamond pavé setting, platinum or white gold band
Scene/backdrop: pure black velvet background, seamless and textureless
Lighting/mood: dramatic studio lighting from multiple angles, creating internal fire and spectral dispersion (fire) within the sapphire, high contrast
Color palette: deep royal blue as dominant, white diamond sparkle as accent, warm fire highlights, black negative space
Materials/textures: faceted gemstone with visible internal refraction, metallic band with subtle reflections, soft velvet matte surface
Avoid: plastic-looking gems, flat lighting, cartoon reflections, oversaturated colors, watermark, 8K stuffer aesthetic
